config.svo.shaderPreset.tooltip: Applies a shader preset preconfigured by the modpack.
config.svo.disableLBGLayers.tooltip: Disables everything related to the "better layers" feature from LambdaBetterGrass, such as better snow layers, while retaining the block side textures.
advancements.story.cutting_edge.title: Embracing the Cutting Edge
advancements.story.cutting_edge.descript: Harvest Flint from Gravel and Sticks from Leaves and make your first tool with an Axe Head
advancements.story.copper_ingot.title: Acquire Software
tutorial.svocore.get_sticks.title: Get some sticks
tutorial.svocore.get_sticks.description: Punch tree leaves to collect sticks
tutorial.svocore.get_flint.title: Get some flint
tutorial.svocore.craft_flint_axe.title: Craft a flint axe
lore.minecraft.lantern: A block that emits more light than a torch. It can be hung from the ceiling, hung on a wall, or placed on the ground.
lore.minecraft.stonecutter: A workstation used to craft building blocks. The job site of Masons.
lore.minecraft.compass: An item that points to the world spawn point. Can be attached to a lodestone to point to it instead.
lore.wooden_tools.custom: It appears to be a tool fashioned entirely out of wood? It doesn't seem very durable...
